# canifileagain.org

> Plain English guide to all bankruptcy filing bars, waiting periods, and discharge bars.

canifileagain.org is a free, open-source educational resource. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://canifileagain.org/ -- Overview of all filing bars, waiting periods, and discharge bars
- https://canifileagain.org/waiting-periods.html -- Detailed waiting period breakdown by chapter
- https://canifileagain.org/stay-limits.html -- Automatic stay limits for repeat filers

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
